sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('quarter', CAST(issued AS DATE)) AS issued_quarter, type AS card_type, COUNT(*) AS issued_cards FROM card WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(issued AS DATE)) BETWEEN 1994 AND 1998 GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2; WITH first_card_tx AS (SELECT dp.client_id, MIN(CAST(t.date AS DATE)) AS first_card_trans_date FROM disp dp JOIN trans t ON t.account_id=dp.account_id WHERE t.operation='VYBER KARTOU' GROUP BY dp.client_id), card_clients AS (SELECT dp.client_id, MIN(CAST(c.issued AS DATE)) AS first_card_issued FROM card c JOIN disp dp ON dp.disp_id=c.disp_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(c.issued AS DATE)) BETWEEN 1994 AND 1998 GROUP BY dp.client_id) SELECT 'issued_card' AS stage, COUNT(*) AS clients FROM card_clients UNION ALL SELECT 'first_card_withdrawal', COUNT(*) FROM card_clients cc JOIN first_card_tx ft ON ft.client_id=cc.client_id AND ft.first_card_trans_date >= cc.first_card_issued; WITH first_card_tx AS (SELECT dp.client_id, MIN(CAST(t.date AS DATE)) AS first_card_trans_date FROM disp dp JOIN trans t ON t.account_id=dp.account_id WHERE t.operation='VYBER KARTOU' GROUP BY dp.client_id), card_clients AS (SELECT dp.client_id, MIN(CAST(c.issued AS DATE)) AS first_card_issued FROM card c JOIN disp dp ON dp.disp_id=c.disp_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(c.issued AS DATE)) BETWEEN 1994 AND 1998 GROUP BY dp.client_id) SELECT AVG(first_card_trans_date - first_card_issued) AS avg_days_to_first_card_transaction FROM card_clients cc JOIN first_card_tx ft ON ft.client_id=cc.client_id WHERE ft.first_card_trans_date >= cc.first_card_issued;

charts.title: Card Issuance to First Card Withdrawal Funnel
Average Days to First Card Transaction

chart_spec.layout_intent: Acquisition dashboard with quarterly trend across the top, funnel and latency KPI below.
